shortDescription: Scaffold and operate contract-governed Discord bot teams with human approval gates.
longDescription: Discord Agent Army is a skills-only Codex plugin that creates isolated, configurable Discord community bots. It includes FAQ-first support tickets, human-reviewed verification, opt-in interest roles, disclosed welcomes and scheduled posts, removable simulations, dry-run provisioning, and fleet health checks. Safety contracts prohibit self-bots, deceptive human impersonation, secret leakage, spam, and autonomous punitive moderation.
starterPrompts: Scaffold a Discord community with the default agent army.
Show the dry-run plan for all managed Discord servers.
Add a contract-governed support agent with human escalation.
